decisions.rationale: SHELL-03 already anchors key header regions (ai_RNbBHWao/au/az/bE) in ui_refs and AC-1; full ai_RNbBKLUd subtree depth (~752 refs) is appropriate to expand during implement per layout_notes, not a decompose under-split.

Signup step groups (ai_RNbBHWbs/bd/ba) and slice path are already cited in decompose; remaining popup field/password-reset nodes can be pulled from ir/inventory.json at SHELL-04 implement without rewriting item boundaries.

AC-quality gap only: AUTH-05 AC-3 owns post-onboarding dashboard routing; SHELL-05 depends_on gates sequencing. Clarify onboarding-incomplete redirect in SHELL-05 or AUTH implement wave — not decompose-blocking per ac-quality rules.
ENUM-03 on SHELL-08/SHELL-10 is speculative for shell-only routes; trim depends_on during implement prep and let MOD-DRSAM-PATHS/MOD-DRSAM-CHAT declare enum deps when tab/mode UI lands.

Missing explicit project/ and adapter out-of-scope lines is documentation polish; all items are frontend-only per scope and implementation-constraints — append one-liners at implement kickoff, not a decompose rewrite.

summary: Review ok (88% readiness); 0 fix_now, 5 defer, 0 accept. Advance decompose: expand SHELL-03/04 ui_refs at implement, clarify SHELL-05 onboarding guard vs AUTH-05, trim ENUM-03 from SHELL-08/10, add out-of-scope clauses at implement.
